revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[:en:ISSN|ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[:en:JSTOR|JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[:en:ISSN|ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[:en:JSTOR|JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[:en:ISSN|ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[:en:JSTOR|JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[:en:ISSN|ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[:en:JSTOR|JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[:en:ISSN|ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Makes a link to a [[:en:JSTOR|JSTOR]] article or journal determined by a given parameter. When using {{cs1}} or {{cs2}} templates, use the {{para|jstor}} parameter directly supported by the template. ==Examples== To reference an individual article, the preferred method is to use the number from the stable URL (e.g. https://www.jstor.org/stable/3562296). This may be found for any article under the '''Item Information''' link: {{JSTOR|3562296}} which gives {{JSTOR|3562296}}. To reference a journal itself, use the [[:en:ISSN|ISSN]]: {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}} resulting in {{JSTOR|issn=00930334}}. ==Examples with citation templates== For citing an article on [[Fermat's Last Theorem]] in a journal and linking it to its JSTOR entry: 
{{cite journal
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
The resulting formatted citation: :{{cite journal | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} Equivalently, 
{{citation
 | last = Wiles | first =  Andrew
 | authorlink = Andrew Wiles
 | year = 1995
 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem
 | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]]
 | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551
 | jstor = 2118559
 | mr = 1333035
 | zbl = 0823.11029
}}
gives :{{citation | last = Wiles | first = Andrew | authorlink = Andrew Wiles | year = 1995 | title = Modular elliptic curves and Fermat's Last Theorem | journal = [[Annals of Mathematics]] | volume = 141 | issue = 3 | pages = 443–551 | jstor = 2118559 | mr = 1333035 | zbl = 0823.11029 }} == Template data == { "params": { "1": { "label": "JSTOR ID", "example": "2118559", "suggested": true }, "stable": {}, "sici": {}, "issn": {}, "no": {} } } {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Specific-source templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
